# MindCheck Tools

> Free, validated mental health screening tools for depression, anxiety, PTSD, ADHD, bipolar disorder, OCD, substance use, and more. Built for people who want a structured, evidence-based starting point before talking to a professional. All tools are free, anonymous, and clinically validated.

## Screening Tools
- [PHQ-9 Depression Test](https://mindchecktools.com/phq-9-depression-test): 9-item validated depression screen; scores 0–27
- [GAD-7 Anxiety Test](https://mindchecktools.com/gad-7-anxiety-test): 7-item generalized anxiety screen; scores 0–21
- [AUDIT Alcohol Test](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-alcohol-test): 10-item alcohol use disorder screen; scores 0–40
- [AUDIT-C Alcohol Screen](https://mindchecktools.com/audit-c-alcohol-screen): 3-item brief alcohol screen
- [PCL-5 PTSD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/pcl-5-ptsd-screening): 20-item PTSD symptom severity; scores 0–80
- [PC-PTSD-5 Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/pc-ptsd-5-screening): 5-item primary care PTSD gateway screen
- [ASRS ADHD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/asrs-adhd-screening): WHO Adult ADHD Self-Report Scale
- [MDQ Bipolar Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/mdq-bipolar-screening): Mood Disorder Questionnaire; 3-part bipolar screen
- [DAST-10 Drug Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/dast-10-drug-screening): 10-item drug use problem screen; scores 0–10
- [CAGE-AID Substance Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/cage-aid-substance-abuse-screening): 4-item alcohol and drug screen
- [DASS-21](https://mindchecktools.com/dass-21-depression-anxiety-stress): Depression, anxiety, and stress — three scales simultaneously
- [OCI-R OCD Screening](https://mindchecktools.com/oci-r-ocd-screening): 18-item OCD symptom screen; scores 0–72; cutoff 21
- [ACE Questionnaire](https://mindchecktools.com/ace-questionnaire): Adverse childhood experiences; scores 0–10
- [Perceived Stress Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/perceived-stress-scale): 10-item stress measure; scores 0–40
- [Rosenberg Self-Esteem Scale](https://mindchecktools.com/rosenberg-self-esteem-scale): 10-item global self-esteem; scores 0–30
- [Mental Load Calculator](https://mindchecktools.com/mental-load-calculator): Measures invisible cognitive and emotional labor

- [What Does Your Rosenberg Self-Esteem Score Mean?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/what-does-rosenberg-self-esteem-score-mean)
- [PHQ-9 vs GAD-7: Which Should You Use?](https://mindchecktools.com/blog/phq-9-vs-gad-7)

## About
- [About MindCheck Tools](https://mindchecktools.com/about): Tools reviewed by a Certified Drug and Alcohol Counselor (CADC-II) with 11 years of clinical experience
- [Privacy Policy](https://mindchecktools.com/privacy): All screening results processed client-side; no health data stored or transmitted
- [Contact](https://mindchecktools.com/contact)

## Crisis Resources
If you are in crisis: call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline), text HOME to 741741 (Crisis Text Line), or call 1-800-662-4357 (SAMHSA National Helpline). All free, 24/7.
